newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Only the ongoing mechanical £100m buyback (42,069 shares repurchased 8-12 June) and a confirmed switch to USD reporting beginning with H1 results, due Aug 12, 2026. No new AI-specific evidence for the galvanizing/facility-hardening pathway.

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold. On a strict latent-alpha screen nothing changed since June 9: only a mechanical buyback and a USD reporting switch. No new AI-specific evidence for the galvanizing/facility-hardening link, and a +30% YTD name at 52-wk highs keeps getting more discovered, not less.
verdicts.bull: USD reporting clarifies US data-centre/infra exposure; record galvanizing demand.
verdicts.neutral: Steady infra compounder; buyback supports EPS but no AI catalyst.
verdicts.bear: AI-node thesis is qualitative; rerating already done, discovery rising.
verdicts.primaryRisk: No direct AI demand signal; crowding into a rerated name
